description: Follow-up call with an existing lead or past client

personalized_opener.description: Agent opens with a specific reference to the last conversation — not a generic 'just checking in'.

status_update_sought.description: Agent asks an open-ended question to understand where the prospect is in their journey.

value_added.description: Agent brings something new — a relevant listing, market update, or useful insight — not just a check-in.

urgency_created.description: Agent highlights a relevant market condition or opportunity to create appropriate urgency.

objection_revisited.description: Agent addresses any objection from the last call with new information or a different angle.

commitment_advanced.description: Agent moves the conversation forward — gets a new commitment, not just a 'stay in touch'.

next_step_confirmed.description: Call ends with a specific next action and timeline agreed upon by both parties.
